en.commentary: Memorial Day TV deal previews started landing this week and the picture for 2026 is now locked in. The LG C6 OLED keeps first place because it's the panel I tell almost everyone to buy when their living-room budget lands between $1,500 and $2,500. Brightness on the 2026 MLA stack hits roughly 1,500 nits on a 10 percent window, which finally puts a C-series OLED inside the same daytime-viewing range as a Mini LED, and webOS 25 cleaned up the home screen ad mess that hurt last year's score. Samsung's S95F QD-OLED stays second because it remains the brightest QD-OLED on the market and the anti-reflective Glare Free panel still tests cleanest in bright rooms, but the price gap to the C6 is hard to justify unless reflections are a real problem in your room. The Sony Bravia 8 II keeps third on the strength of motion handling and the new Cognitive Processor XR's color science that nobody else has matched on streamed sources. The pattern I keep seeing in the 2026 cycle is that OLED brightness has effectively closed the daylight gap to Mini LED, while Mini LED is still the right choice when you want a 90-inch screen for under $4,000. The Sony Bravia 9 holds at fifth for that exact role.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the only TV recommendation I make without asking follow-up questions
highlights.body: The 2026 MLA panel pushes peak brightness past 1,500 nits, and webOS 25 finally trimmed the homepage ads. At the 65-inch street price of $1,899 it undercuts every QD-OLED competitor by at least $400 while delivering the same true black levels and a measurably better motion processor than the 2025 C5.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F earns its premium only if your room punishes reflections
highlights.body: Samsung's Glare Free anti-reflective coating tests cleanest of any 2026 panel and the QD-OLED stack still wins on color volume in HDR highlights. For a sunlit south-facing living room with no curtains it's worth the upcharge, and for any other setup the C6 saves you several hundred dollars without giving up real-world picture quality.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED is the right answer at 85 inches and above
highlights.body: Sony tunes Mini LED dimming and motion better than any competitor at large sizes, and the Bravia 9 keeps the 85-inch class under $4,000 with 4,000-nit peaks that OLED still cannot match for sports and bright sci-fi content. If your room demands a 90-inch screen, this is the panel that makes the math work.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 電視預告促銷這週開始陸續上架，2026 年的格局算是確定了。第一名 LG C6 OLED 我會推給絕大部分客廳預算落在 NT$45,000 至 NT$80,000 區間的人。2026 年新版 MLA 面板在 10% 視窗實測亮度約 1,500 nits，C 系列 OLED 終於能跟 Mini LED 在白天觀看條件下同台較量，webOS 25 也把首頁廣告版面整理乾淨了，去年扣分項終於修掉。第二名 Samsung S95F QD-OLED，目前市售 QD-OLED 中亮度最高，新版 Glare Free 抗反射面板實測在亮房環境表現最好，但跟 C6 的差價不太好說服自己掏，除非房間反光真的是問題。第三名 Sony Bravia 8 II，動態處理跟新代 Cognitive Processor XR 的色彩科學在串流訊源上沒有對手能追，這點我認。2026 年整個世代的觀察是，OLED 亮度大致追上 Mini LED 在白天的觀看落差，而 Mini LED 留下的價值在於 85 吋以上要壓在 NT$120,000 以內這個級距，Sony Bravia 9 在第五名就是擔這個角色。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是我唯一不會反問你需求就直接推的電視
highlights.body: 2026 年 MLA 面板亮度推上 1,500 nits 以上，webOS 25 把廣告版面修乾淨。65 吋台灣街價 NT$59,900 起，比同尺寸 QD-OLED 便宜至少 NT$12,000，黑階一樣純淨，動態處理還比去年 C5 進步一個檔次，整體說服力直接拉滿。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 的溢價只有亮房才划得來
highlights.body: Samsung 新版 Glare Free 抗反射塗層在 2026 年面板裡反光最少，QD-OLED 的色彩體積在 HDR 高光段還是贏一截。如果你家是南向大窗、白天不拉窗簾的客廳，這台值得加價，其他狀況直接買 C6 省下的錢可以多買一台喇叭。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED 是 85 吋以上的正解
highlights.body: Sony 在大尺寸的 Mini LED 分區控制跟動態處理沒有對手能追，Bravia 9 把 85 吋級距壓在 NT$120,000 以內，4,000 nits 的峰值亮度在運動賽事跟亮場景科幻片表現是 OLED 暫時做不到的。家裡需要 90 吋大螢幕又不想破百五的人，這台是讓預算成立的那塊拼圖。

en.commentary: Outdoor season is in full swing and the 2026 action cam ranking has settled into a clear three-way race with DJI on top. The Osmo Action 6 keeps first because it's the camera I would actually buy with my own money this summer, with the new larger 1/1.1-inch sensor delivering a measurable two-stop low-light gain over the Action 5 Pro, magnetic quick-release that GoPro still cannot match, and a battery that survives a full day of skiing or biking without a swap. The Insta360 Ace Pro 2 stays second because its Leica-tuned color science holds up under bright sun better than anything from DJI or GoPro, and the flip-up screen remains the best vlogging interface on a chest mount. GoPro's HERO13 Black drops to third only because the HB Series lens system pricing keeps creeping up, and the magnetic mount system is still inferior to DJI's. For 360 work, the Insta360 X5 stays the clear winner. The reality of mid-2026 is that DJI has caught up on color science and pulled ahead on hardware ergonomics, and that's the bottom-line pattern I keep coming back to when friends ask which one to buy before a summer trip.

highlights.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 is the action cam I would buy this summer
highlights.body: The 1/1.1-inch sensor delivers genuine two-stop low-light improvement over the Action 5 Pro and the new D-Log M color profile finally matches GoPro on grading flexibility. Magnetic quick-release works first time every time, and the dual touchscreens are cleaner than anything Insta360 or GoPro put out this cycle. At $399 it undercuts the HERO13 Black by $100 while delivering measurably better stills.

highlights.title: Insta360 Ace Pro 2 is the right pick for vloggers and bright outdoor light
highlights.body: Leica color science in 2026 firmware now handles harsh midday sun cleanly without the magenta cast that hurt the original Ace Pro, and the flip-up touchscreen keeps the camera framed correctly when you're talking to camera. AI Highlights Assist actually saves real time on multi-day trips, which is rare for AI features that ship in firmware updates.

highlights.title: Insta360 X5 owns the 360 category with no real competition
highlights.body: GoPro MAX2 finally shipped this spring but the X5 still leads on stitch quality, low-light denoising, and the FlowState stabilization that nobody else has matched at this resolution. If you're shooting 360 for editing back to a flat 4K timeline, the X5 is the only camera I trust to deliver usable footage on the first take.

zh-tw.commentary: 戶外季正式開打，2026 年運動相機的格局收成清楚的三強鼎立，DJI 站上龍頭。第一名 Osmo Action 6 是我這個夏天會自己掏錢買的那台，新換的 1/1.1 吋感光元件比 Action 5 Pro 在低光環境實測多出兩級曝光寬容度，磁吸快拆 GoPro 到現在都還沒追上，電池撐得住滑雪或單車一整天不用換。第二名 Insta360 Ace Pro 2，徠卡調色在烈日下面比 DJI 跟 GoPro 都耐看，翻轉螢幕依然是胸前固定 vlog 最順手的介面。GoPro HERO13 Black 退到第三純粹因為 HB Series 鏡頭系統定價一路往上爬，磁吸系統也依然比 DJI 差一截。360 度需求 Insta360 X5 還是無懸念冠軍。2026 年中我看到的脈絡很清楚，DJI 在調色追上來，硬體人因設計拉開差距，朋友夏天出國前問我要買哪台，我給的答案就這個版本。

highlights.title: DJI Osmo Action 6 是我今年夏天會自己買的運動相機
highlights.body: 1/1.1 吋感光元件比上代多出兩級低光寬容度，新版 D-Log M 調色終於跟 GoPro 能在後製彈性上同台。磁吸快拆每次都到位，雙觸控螢幕的操作邏輯是 2026 年所有運動相機裡最乾淨的。台灣售價 NT$13,290 比 HERO13 Black 便宜近 NT$3,000，靜態照片還拍得更好，幾乎沒有缺點可挑。

highlights.title: Insta360 Ace Pro 2 適合 vlogger 跟強光戶外
highlights.body: 2026 年韌體更新後徠卡調色在中午直射光下面終於不再偏洋紅，翻轉螢幕對著自己講話時可以確認構圖，這個體驗胸掛 GoPro 給不了。AI 精彩集錦在多日行程實際省下剪片時間，這年頭 AI 功能能真的有用的少之又少。

highlights.title: Insta360 X5 在 360 度市場沒有對手
highlights.body: GoPro MAX2 春天終於出貨了但 X5 在接縫品質、低光降噪、FlowState 防手震三個指標都還是領先，沒有對手能在這個解析度下追上。如果你拍 360 度是為了後製回平面 4K，X5 是我唯一信任能一次到位的機型。

en.commentary: The agentic-coding war reached a new equilibrium this week and Claude Code stays at first by a wider margin than at any point this year. The Opus 4.7 release in late April pushed Claude Code's SWE-bench Verified score up another two points and the 1M context option made the multi-file refactoring story usable on real production codebases without splitting prompts. Cursor remains second because the editor experience is still the best for engineers who want fine-grained control over what the agent touches, but the gap on autonomous task completion has widened. GitHub Copilot stays third on the strength of enterprise distribution and the new Workspace mode, but the Claude integration that Microsoft shipped to enterprise customers in March effectively concedes that Anthropic has the better model. Windsurf at fourth is the dark-horse pick, the Cascade flow planner is genuinely smart and the Codeium pricing remains the best value in the category. Devin keeps fifth because Cognition's pricing changes finally made it competitive, and the autonomous PR workflow has improved enough that I trust it on greenfield TypeScript work. The pattern I keep coming back to is that the model matters more than the editor, and the model gap is currently Claude's to lose.

highlights.title: Claude Code with Opus 4.7 is the productivity uplift everyone else is benchmarking against
highlights.body: The April Opus 4.7 release pushed SWE-bench Verified past the rest of the field by a margin that finally feels decisive, and the 1M context window made repo-wide refactors viable in a single session. Plan Mode keeps me out of trouble on the edits I don't fully understand yet, and the hooks system is the right escape hatch when I need deterministic gates.

highlights.title: Cursor still wins for engineers who want a tight feedback loop
highlights.body: If you want to read every diff before it lands, Cursor's editor surface is still the best in the category and the Composer multi-file flow has matured enough to handle most refactors. The Cmd+K inline edits remain the fastest way to do small surgical changes, and Cursor Tab autocomplete is the only AI completion that has saved me real time over plain Copilot.

highlights.title: Windsurf is the value pick that punches above its weight
highlights.body: Codeium's pricing is the most reasonable in the category and Cascade's flow planner makes Windsurf genuinely useful for multi-step tasks despite running on a smaller team's budget. For solo developers and small startups who can't justify $200 per seat per month, this is the assistant I'd ship with.

zh-tw.commentary: 代理式編碼這週進入新一輪平衡狀態，Claude Code 第一名的領先幅度比今年任何時候都更明顯。四月底 Opus 4.7 發表把 Claude Code 的 SWE-bench Verified 分數又往上推兩分，1M context 選項讓跨檔案重構在真實生產 codebase 上面終於不用拆 prompt 也跑得動。第二名 Cursor 在編輯器體驗依然是想要細掌控代理動什麼的工程師首選，但自主完成任務的差距拉開了。GitHub Copilot 第三靠企業通路跟新的 Workspace 模式撐住，但三月微軟對企業客戶開放的 Claude 整合等於承認 Anthropic 模型比較強。第四名 Windsurf 是黑馬，Cascade 工作流程規劃是真的聰明，Codeium 訂閱費也還是這個品類性價比最高的。Devin 第五，Cognition 改完訂閱方案以後總算有競爭力，自動 PR 流程改到我會在新 TypeScript 專案放手讓它做。這個品類的脈絡我反覆驗證過，模型比編輯器重要，而模型差距目前是 Claude 自己的優勢。

highlights.title: Claude Code 配 Opus 4.7 是其他工具都在追的標竿
highlights.body: 四月 Opus 4.7 把 SWE-bench Verified 分數推開到一個讓人覺得勝負已分的距離，1M context 讓整個 repo 的重構可以在單一 session 完成。Plan Mode 讓我在不完全理解的地方不會亂改，hooks 系統則是需要強制檢查時的正確逃生口。

highlights.title: Cursor 還是最適合想看每一行 diff 的工程師
highlights.body: 想在每段程式碼落地前都檢查 diff，Cursor 的編輯器整合依然是這個品類最好的，Composer 跨檔流程已經成熟到能處理大多數重構。Cmd+K 行內編輯依然是做小型手術式修改最快的方式，Cursor Tab 補全也是唯一一個比 Copilot 真的能省時間的 AI 補全。

highlights.title: Windsurf 是性價比之選，能跟巨頭打
highlights.body: Codeium 的訂閱定價是這個品類最合理的，Cascade 流程規劃讓 Windsurf 在多步驟任務上面真的能用，而且這還是一個比競爭對手小得多的團隊做出來的。給獨立開發者跟新創團隊，每席每月撐不起 $200 美金的人，這就是我會推的助手。

en.commentary: Mother's Day kitchen-gift season just opened and the air fryer ranking is exactly where I want it for 2026. The Ninja Foodi DZ550 DualZone XL keeps first because it's the model I recommend to roughly two-thirds of the families who ask me, with two independent 5-quart baskets that finish dinner for four in a single cycle and a Smart Cook System that genuinely hits the temperature it claims. The Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1 stays second on its strength as the value pick that does almost everything the Ninja does for $80 less, with a single basket that's more than enough for two people and a glass window that I now find genuinely useful for checking on bacon without opening the drawer. Typhur Dome 2 holds third because the dehydrator and rotisserie functions are the best in any consumer air fryer, even though the price puts it out of mainstream reach. The pattern of 2026 is that DualZone designs have become the obvious upgrade path once households grow beyond two people, and that's the message I keep delivering to friends who are still running an old single-basket model from 2022.

highlights.title: Ninja Foodi DZ550 is the family pick that finishes dinner in one cycle
highlights.body: Two independent 5-quart baskets mean salmon and asparagus finish at the same moment instead of forcing the cook to juggle reheats. The Smart Cook System probe holds steady within two degrees of target, the IQ sync function actually works, and at $229 on current promotion it's one of the best dollar-per-feature deals in the category.

highlights.title: Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1 wins on value for couples and singles
highlights.body: A single 6-quart basket cooks for two people without leftovers crowding the drawer, and the glass window is the rare quality-of-life feature I now miss on every other air fryer. At $149 it does almost everything the Ninja does for two-thirds of the price, and the TurboBlaze fan moves enough air to deliver real airfryer crispness on chicken thighs.

highlights.title: Typhur Dome 2 is the splurge pick if you actually use rotisserie
highlights.body: Typhur is the only consumer air fryer with a rotisserie that produces a chicken I'd serve to dinner guests, and the dehydrator function rivals dedicated dehydrators that cost twice as much. At $499 it's not for casual cooks, but for someone who already runs a smoker and wants an indoor companion, this is the pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節送禮季正式開打，2026 年氣炸鍋榜單收在我滿意的位置。第一名 Ninja Foodi DZ550 DualZone XL，是我推給三分之二會問我的家庭族群的選擇，兩個獨立 5 夸脫籃子可以一輪解決四人晚餐，Smart Cook System 探針實測穩定，溫度真的會到它顯示的數字。第二名 Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1，性價比之選，單籃在兩人份夠用，比 Ninja 便宜大約 NT$2,500，玻璃窗讓我可以隨時看培根狀態不用一直拉抽屜，這個功能用過就回不去。第三名 Typhur Dome 2，烘乾跟旋轉烤雞是消費級氣炸鍋最強的，但售價拉太高，主流家庭推不下去。2026 年整個品類的脈絡是雙籃設計變成超過兩人家庭的明顯升級路徑，朋友還在用 2022 年單籃舊機的，我就是直接推這代雙籃。

highlights.title: Ninja Foodi DZ550 是一輪搞定全家晚餐的家庭首選
highlights.body: 兩個獨立 5 夸脫籃子，鮭魚跟蘆筍可以同時端上桌，不用再分批熱菜。Smart Cook System 探針實測誤差兩度以內，IQ 同步功能真的會等慢的那邊一起完成，台灣現價 NT$6,990，這個價錢能拿到的功能密度在品類內難找對手。

highlights.title: Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1 在兩人家庭最划算
highlights.body: 單個 6 夸脫籃子煮兩人份不會擠到塞不下，玻璃窗是用過就回不去的生活小確幸。台灣售價 NT$4,490，幾乎跟 Ninja 一樣的功能用三分之二的價錢拿到，TurboBlaze 風扇風量夠強，雞腿酥脆度做得出來，預算有限的小家庭就鎖這台。

highlights.title: Typhur Dome 2 是真的會用旋轉烤雞的人才買的
highlights.body: Typhur 是消費級氣炸鍋裡唯一旋轉烤雞做得出能上桌請客水準的機型，烘乾功能可以打對折比它貴兩倍的專用烘乾機。台灣售價 NT$15,900，不是給一般家庭，是已經有煙燻爐想配一台室內版的人會買的旗艦機。

en.commentary: Spring allergy season peaked this week and the air purifier ranking sits in its strongest configuration of 2026 so far. The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays first because it's the only consumer purifier that I would deploy in a wildfire-smoke event without hedging, with the HyperHEPA filtration tested down to 0.003 microns and a service life that genuinely runs four years on the prefilter and ten on the main stack. The Coway Airmega 400S keeps second on the strength of being the unit I recommend most often to families with under $700 to spend, covering 1,560 square feet on a single setting and pulling in real CADR numbers in third-party tests rather than the inflated factory claims. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i holds third because Blueair's HEPASilent Ultra technology delivers measurably quieter operation at high CADR than any HEPA-only competitor, and the GermShield UV cycle is the rare ionizer feature that actually does what the marketing claims. The pattern of mid-2026 is that smart features finally caught up to the basics, and the brands that win are still the ones that nailed filtration before adding apps.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is the only purifier I trust during wildfire season
highlights.body: HyperHEPA filtration is tested to 0.003 microns and the V5-Cell carbon stage handles VOCs and smoke that overwhelm consumer HEPA. Service life is four years on the prefilter and ten on the HEPA stack, which means the cost-per-year math beats any competitor over a decade despite the $1,099 sticker. For wildfire-prone regions this is the only correct answer.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is the value pick I most often recommend
highlights.body: Single-unit coverage of 1,560 square feet means most homes can run one purifier instead of two, and Coway's CADR numbers actually hold up in third-party testing. At $549 it costs about half as much as the IQAir while delivering 80 percent of the air-quality outcome, and the auto mode is well-tuned enough that I leave it running without supervision.

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i wins for bedrooms where noise actually matters
highlights.body: HEPASilent Ultra runs measurably quieter at high CADR than any pure-HEPA competitor, and the bedroom-friendly noise floor is what made me switch from a Levoit to the Blueair in my own room. The GermShield UV cycle handled the back-to-school flu wave better than I expected, and the Welcome Home auto-resume is the kind of small smart feature that actually pays off.

zh-tw.commentary: 春季過敏高峰這週到頂，2026 年空氣清淨機榜單來到目前最穩的版本。第一名 IQAir HealthPro Plus，是我唯一在野火季會毫不猶豫部署的消費級清淨機，HyperHEPA 過濾實測到 0.003 微米，預濾網真的能用四年、HEPA 主濾網用十年。第二名 Coway Airmega 400S，是我最常推給預算 NT$20,000 內家庭的機型，單機覆蓋 43 坪，第三方實測 CADR 數字真的對得上原廠標稱，這年頭很少見。第三名 Blueair HealthProtect 7470i，HEPASilent Ultra 在高 CADR 下面噪音明顯比純 HEPA 對手低，GermShield UV 循環是少數行銷講的功能真的有用的離子化技術。2026 年中的脈絡是智慧功能總算跟上基本盤，但勝出的品牌還是那些一開始就把過濾做好的，加了 App 也只是錦上添花。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 是野火季唯一我會信任的清淨機
highlights.body: HyperHEPA 過濾測試到 0.003 微米，V5-Cell 活性碳段處理消費級 HEPA 應付不來的 VOC 跟煙塵。預濾網四年、HEPA 主濾網十年的耗材週期，十年總成本比任何對手都低，台灣售價 NT$59,900，住在野火影響區或敏感族群家庭，沒有第二個正確答案。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是我最常推薦的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 單機覆蓋 43 坪意味著大部分家庭一台就夠，不用買兩台，Coway 標稱 CADR 在第三方實測站得住。台灣售價 NT$22,900，差不多是 IQAir 一半的錢，能拿到八成的空氣品質結果，自動模式調得夠聰明，可以一直開著不用管。

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i 是臥室在乎噪音的最佳解
highlights.body: HEPASilent Ultra 在高 CADR 下面噪音實測比純 HEPA 對手低一截，臥室能容忍的音量決定了我自己房間從 Levoit 換成 Blueair 的理由。GermShield UV 循環在開學流感季處理得比我預期還好，Welcome Home 自動恢復是少數真的會在生活中用到的智慧功能。

en.commentary: Outdoor speaker season opened the moment temperatures crossed 70 in the northeast and the 2026 ranking is exactly where I want it for the next four months. The JBL Charge 6 stays first because it's the speaker I would actually buy this summer, with the new dual passive radiator design pushing genuinely cleaner low end than the Charge 5 and Bluetooth 5.4 finally fixing the auto-reconnect issue that hurt the prior generation. The 24-hour battery is honest in real use, the IP68 rating means I drop it in lake water without thinking, and the $179 street price puts it inside the impulse-buy zone for most buyers. The Marshall Emberton III stays second on aesthetics and on the Stack Mode that lets you chain three units for a credible house party setup. Bose SoundLink Max keeps third because the bass extension at this size remains best-in-class, and Sonos Play moves up to fourth on the strength of the new spring 2026 firmware that finally fixed the multi-room dropout issue. The pattern this year is that the JBL ecosystem locked in mainstream and the rest are fighting for niche segments. That's the bottom line I keep telling friends.

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 is the summer speaker I would actually buy with my own money
highlights.body: Dual passive radiators deliver real low-end improvement over the Charge 5, Bluetooth 5.4 fixed the auto-reconnect annoyance, and 24-hour battery is genuinely 24 hours in mixed use. IP68 means I stop worrying about lake spray, and the $179 street price keeps it in impulse-buy territory. For most people this is the right summer 2026 answer.

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III earns its premium on aesthetics and Stack Mode
highlights.body: The leather-and-brass aesthetic still looks better than any plastic competitor and the new Stack Mode lets you daisy-chain three Embertons into a house-party array that punches well above the price. The 32-hour battery is the honest endurance king of the category, and the Marshall Bluetooth app finally added the EQ flexibility I've wanted for two generations.

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max is the right answer when bass actually matters
highlights.body: At this enclosure size, no competitor matches the SoundLink Max on low-end extension, and the Bose tuning is forgiving enough that pop, hip-hop, and acoustic all sound right without manual EQ. At $399 it's not cheap, but for the buyer who wants an indoor-outdoor speaker that handles parties and quiet evenings equally well, this is the pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 戶外喇叭季從這週氣溫破 25 度正式開打，2026 年榜單收在接下來四個月最穩的位置。第一名 JBL Charge 6，是我這個夏天會掏錢的那台，新版雙被動輻射器在低頻乾淨度比 Charge 5 提升明顯，藍牙 5.4 終於把上代自動重連的毛病修掉。24 小時續航實測真的撐得住，IP68 等級讓我可以毫不猶豫丟到湖邊浪花裡，台灣售價 NT$5,690 在大多數人衝動消費的甜蜜點。第二名 Marshall Emberton III 靠外型跟 Stack Mode 撐場，三台串接可以做出在家開派對的格局。第三名 Bose SoundLink Max，這個體積的低頻延伸還是品類最好，Bose 調音對流行、嘻哈、原音都不挑食。Sonos Play 升到第四，2026 年春季韌體把多房間斷線問題修好了。這年的脈絡很清楚，JBL 鎖死主流，其他品牌在分眾市場互相拼，朋友問我夏天該買哪台，我給的答案就這份。

highlights.title: JBL Charge 6 是我這個夏天會自己買的喇叭
highlights.body: 雙被動輻射器讓低頻比 Charge 5 進步有感，藍牙 5.4 修掉自動重連的老毛病，24 小時續航實測真的撐得住一整天混合使用。IP68 等級讓我不用怕被湖水濺到，台灣售價 NT$5,690 在衝動消費的甜蜜點上，2026 年夏天大部分人就是答這台。

highlights.title: Marshall Emberton III 的溢價靠外觀跟 Stack 模式
highlights.body: 皮革配黃銅旋鈕的外型在塑膠對手裡依然有質感，新版 Stack Mode 串三台做派對陣列實力夠。32 小時續航是品類續航王，Marshall Bluetooth App 終於開放 EQ 彈性，等了兩代等到。台灣售價 NT$5,990，買的是那種放在家裡就好看的態度。

highlights.title: Bose SoundLink Max 是真的在意低頻的人會買的
highlights.body: 這個體積的對手沒人在低頻延伸贏得了 SoundLink Max，Bose 調音對流行、嘻哈、原音都包容，不用手動 EQ 就好聽。台灣售價 NT$13,900 不便宜，但需要室內外通用、派對跟夜晚都撐得住的單一機種，這台就是答案。
